description: A player from the EU submits a formal request to have all their personal data and game account deleted under GDPR.

nodes.task_description: Verify the player's identity to confirm they are the legitimate account owner.

expected_outcome.value: Agent completes the enhanced identity verification process.

nodes.task_description: Initiate the automated GDPR data deletion workflow for the player's account.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully triggers the deletion process.

nodes.task_description: Monitor the workflow to ensure data is purged from all systems (game servers, CRM, analytics).

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the workflow completes successfully and all data is anonymized or deleted.

nodes.task_description: Send a final confirmation email to the player once the process is complete.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends the official confirmation of data deletion.
